Singleton event loop implementation and callback binding templates for JerryScript mbed environment.

## Folders
- **[source](source/README.md)**: Implements a singleton event loop for the JerryScript mbed environment.

## Files
- **[BoundCallback.h](BoundCallback.h.md)**: Defines the `BoundCallback` template class for binding callbacks with up to four arguments.
- **[EventLoop.h](EventLoop.h.md)**: Defines an `EventLoop` class for managing and dispatching events using JerryScript and mbed OS.
